scoreBreakdown.name: Profit and stock consistency
scoreBreakdown.description: Compares inventory values, declared profit, and business size so suspicious gaps reduce the credit percentage.

scoreBreakdown.name: Receipt trust
scoreBreakdown.description: Rewards businesses that can back their claims with more receipts and stronger receipt-value coverage.

scoreBreakdown.name: Identity assurance
scoreBreakdown.description: Tracks when a ready business has submitted a NIN and whether NIRA or NITA verification has cleared it.

scoreBreakdown.name: Record completeness
scoreBreakdown.description: Checks whether sales, location, stock, and digital payment details are complete enough to trust the credit model.

loanPrograms.requirement: Credit score 70+, NIN submission, 90 days of consistent records
Strong stock-profit alignment and receipt support
Verified owner NIN, credit score 68+, strong digital history

watchlist.title: Active stock pressure in live businesses
watchlist.detail: 11 stock alerts are currently below reorder level across the registry.

watchlist.title: Receipt evidence still missing in part of the portfolio
watchlist.detail: 5 businesses still have fewer than five receipts recorded in the database.

watchlist.title: Formalization still depends on TIN capture
watchlist.detail: 6 businesses do not yet have a TIN on file for tax-readiness checks.

interventions.title: Resolve low-stock businesses first
interventions.detail: Prioritize support for the 11 businesses already at or below the reorder threshold.

interventions.title: Improve receipt discipline
interventions.detail: Focus bookkeeping support on the 5 businesses with weak receipt evidence.

interventions.title: Close TIN coverage gaps
interventions.detail: Push compliance outreach for the 6 businesses missing tax identifiers.
